## Summary

Describe the change and the repository area it touches.

## Checklist

- [ ] I inspected the impacted files before editing them.
- [ ] I did not add hardcoded tunables, secrets, or environment-specific values.
- [ ] I checked for secret leakage in code, logs, fixtures, and docs.
- [ ] I updated docs when behavior, routes, config, or limitations changed.
- [ ] I ran the relevant tests or validation commands, or I explained why I could not.
- [ ] Any migration or schema change is safe, additive, or clearly called out.
- [ ] If an API contract changed, I updated the frontend endpoint mapping or documented the mismatch.
- [ ] I considered the security impact of this change.
